**This package is a placeholder.** Its content is **generated by the looprun `agentspec` skill**, not
hand-written. It was reset to a clean state so the domain can be regenerated **natively** (via the Skill
tool, in a fresh session where the skill is registered).

`src/index.ts` currently exports only the *contract* the rest of the harness consumes
(`telecomSupportSpec`, `THEME`, `TelecomWorld`) as throw-on-use placeholders â€” enough to typecheck the
workspace, nothing that runs.
